channel.title: design on Hugo O. Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in design on Hugo O. Rivera

item.title: hugo-hugo-coder
item.description: A minimalist blog theme for hugo.. In use at roguh.com

item.title: hugo-hugo-theme-massively
item.description: Massively theme for Hugo static site generator. In use at emarketing.roguh.com

item.title: polybar-themer
item.description: A theme generator for polybar, a popular status bar for Linux. Uses math and advanced YAML parsing to generate colorful, sensible color schemes.
